entries.text: Make the soft-match LCS threshold configurable via a CLI flag (e.g. `git-tasks reconcile --soft-match-threshold 0.8`) and a workspace setting. 0.7 is a reasonable default but teams with very rigid style guides may want to tighten it.
entries.author: git-tasks team

entries.text: Three-way JSON merge strategy. We merge `.git-tasks/<file>.json` by entry `id`, doing field-wise three-way merge for entries edited on both sides (`updatedAt` is the tiebreaker for scalar fields; `tags` are unioned). This avoids textual JSON conflicts when two branches simply add new entries to the same file, and keeps last-writer-wins predictable. Rejected alternatives: (a) entry-wise last-writer-wins (loses concurrent field edits), (b) prompt user on every concurrent edit (kills the zero-friction merge UX). If this changes, update `mergeEntry` and the README "git-tasks install-merge-driver" section (under "Surviving PR merges and conflicts") together.
entries.author: git-tasks team
